message:
feat(alloc): add arena throughput benchmarks and stress tests for PaneArenaRegistry

Adds criterion benchmarks and integration-style stress tests for
PaneArenaRegistry, the per-pane arena allocator used by the fleet
memory system.

Benchmarks (benches/arena_throughput.rs) cover 8 scenarios with
documented performance budgets:
- Single reserve/release (<500ns)
- Tracked bytes update (<200ns)
- 200-pane batch operations (<100us-500us)
- Contention patterns and rapid churn

Stress tests (tests/arena_stress.rs) cover 10 scenarios:
- 200-pane full lifecycle leak checks
- Rapid churn over 10 rounds
- Interleaved reserve/release simulating agent restarts
- Arena ID monotonicity and peak watermark correctness
- Duplicate reserve idempotency and large pane IDs (u64 range)
- Aggregate byte totals
- Multi-threaded concurrent access with 8 threads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,3 +22,10 @@ jemalloc = ["dep:tikv-jemallocator", "dep:tikv-jemalloc-ctl"]
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tikv-jemallocator = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 tikv-jemalloc-ctl = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+criterion.workspace = true
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "arena_throughput"
+harness = false
